## Type of Change

- [ ] Theory content (new paper, theorem, proof)
- [ ] Theory fix (correction, clarification, gap closure)
- [ ] Documentation (README, glossary, cross-references)

| Claim | Status | Notes |

## Audit Checklist

- [ ] No circularity introduced (claims don't depend on what they're deriving)
- [ ] Notation consistent with existing papers (see glossary)
- [ ] Status labels (✅/⚠️/❌) applied to all theorems/propositions
- [ ] Cross-references updated if notation or definitions changed
- [ ] Frontmatter complete (`series_order`, `draft` status, etc.)
